name: Snowman Logistics Limited
summary: Snowman Logistics Limited provides integrated temperature-controlled logistics services in India. The company operates through three segments: Warehousing Services, Transportation Services, and Consignment Agency Services. It offers warehousing solutions that cover ambient, chilled, frozen, and blast freezing facilities. The company also provides primary transportation services, such as door-to-door, customized milk run, and part cargo consolidation service; and secondary transportation services comprising last mile distribution to QSRs, retail outlets, restaurants and hotels, and others. It operates a fleet of approximately 293 refrigerated vehicles. In addition, the company offers retail distribution through a consignment agency services; and value added services, such as kitting, labelling, sorting, stuffing, and de-stuffing of containers, repacking, and bulk breaking. Further, the company sorts, grades, packs, and washes selected fruits and vegetables. The company was formerly known as Snowman Frozen Foods Limited and changed its name to Snowman Logistics Limited in March 2011. Snowman Logistics Limited was founded in 1993 and is based in Bengaluru, India.
